column1: Hey Mia, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
what's good we got your form on our website for some spring break options. were you still interested in info?
hey it's Spiffy with SpringBreak U checkin in. lmk which week your spring break is and I'll send the options we have avail for that week
yoo Mia, ain't hear back from you in a while wanted to make sure you're good. you still lookin for help with spring break plans?
what's up Mia, feel free to let us know if you're no longer interested in a spring break trip with SpringBreak U. You can respond 'not interested' if so
yo! you requested some info about spring break 2026 packages with us at SBU. you still looking for some details?
whats good Mia its Spiffy with SBU. has helped you yet with spring break? if not lmk, I'll get you hooked up. this year gonna be lit
hi! sorry i haven't replied yet, are u still able to help me with spring break?
hey all good. yea, which week is your spring break
cool and which were you interested in between Punta Cana, Cancun, Cabo, or all?
yea both are dope. how many ppl in your group so far?
Yea that's solid! You all from the same school?
Word! Will def hook it up for y'all
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
i think we still have some people on the fence about it so we were thinking within two weeks
Ahh got you. Yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send most of it through email? It's a little long for text
Dope what's the best email to send to?
hey apologies was stuck in meetings! will send this now
just sent that over lmk if you got it
got it thank u! we'll look over it later today!
perfect yea lmk what the group thinks
heyy Mia whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
would u be able to give a little more detail about what is included with this package?
Yea I got you. Did you get the email I sent over? Just wanna look at it at the same time as you and refer to it
sorry im looking at it now, are there specific days that we would check in/out?
we can start any day you'd like. the two main options are 4 night or 5 night stays. the start date is up to you. most come in on the 21st your week
ok sounds good, and then are the on-location spring break hosts like the parties at the hotel?
on location hosts are our onsite staff thats there to help you with anything you need, any time. you'll get help with checking in, navigating the resort, adding things to your package, etc
the parties at the hotel are included in the package as well
ohh ok makes sense thank you
hey checkin in, did we wanna make a move on that package?
we are really wanting to book, we're just waiting on confirmation from our fourth person
okay cool yea just lmk! we can alsways get the 3 of you in and add someone later on
hey whats up, did you hear back from your 4th person?
Yes, she is just looking at flights
Sorry I did have one more question, if we are not all on the same flights, would airport transfers still be provided?
yea everyone enters their own flight info into their account. our operations team take that and plans out transportation times
heyy Mia checkin in, did we wanna make a move on that package?
okay dope. was that the 4 night or 5?
got you. is it gonna be 3 or 4 of you?
3 of us for sure and the 4th is just waiting on confirmation from her boss that she can get that time off
aight bet I'll get that started for y'all right now
sup Mia! was it Cancun or Cabo that we wanted to book
yea for sure. we ready to get things secured tonight?
heyy Mia checkin in, were we looking to get things secured?
Okay cool. I can make the reservation now and send over tn if yall are ready!
when/if our fourth confirms would we still be able to add her to the reservation?
yea! long as its within reasonable time
just sent that over lmk if you got it
if you need any help navigating through I got you
got it thank you so much!!
our fourth person is in! would we be able to add her?
yoooo Mia whats up! can you let SreePriya know to make her balance payment so we can get the rest of the group processed
yes for sure i'll let her know!
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers. Thanks!
Also for your flight, do you guys have a plan for the overnight or are you just gonna chill at the airport?
yeah for sure i just let them know!
we were planning on just chilling at the airport our layovers a little under 3 hours i think
okay yea thats right, I looked at it wrong. our transportation team will be ready for you when you land!
Mia whats up! did y'all want to add any of the party pass events or booze cruise to your trips?
we are looking at the options right now! would we choose what day/time the booze cruise would be?
oh also if we didn't add any of the party packages but still wanted to go to one of the dj nights do you know how much that upcharge would be?
hey pardon the late response sorry abt that
missed this somehow. so for the booze cruise, your time and day will be assigned to you when you get to the party pass desk based on whats available
with the party pass, youre able to go to a couple venues without an upcharge. but the main headliner DJ nights have a slight upcharge of $10-15
when you check in tomorrow you can head to the party pass desk to get tickets for any of those events. look for veronica when you get there she'll give you all the information you need
hey sorry our group just landed but we're in the domestic terminal, do we need to get over to the other terminal or should we wait here for the transfer
Mia! Pardon the late response. Is everything okay? Were they able to find you
heyy Mia just wanted to check in, everything going smoothly?
yes everything has been so awesome so far!
